edit.edit_instruction: Add a bright red annotation in the open upper-right area near the bride’s head: place bold text reading “crown-like headpiece” with a thin red arrow pointing toward the gold ornament on the bride’s forehead hairline. Keep the arrow tip just beside the ornament without covering her face, jewelry, flowers, or any important visual details. Use a bold sans-serif font, approximately the size of a small caption relative to the image, with a 3 px red stroke for the arrow and text outline if needed for readability. Preserve all original image content unchanged.

style_constraints.font_size_px_or_relative: about 4% of image height
style_constraints.alignment: left-aligned text with arrow pointing down-left toward the headpiece
